title: Dunning schedule catalog
description: Reference table for the retry ladder + dunning notification cadence. Enumerates the sequence of retry attempts + reminder notifications after a failed renewal. Feeds TriggerRetryLadderOnRenewalFailed hook + NotifyPaymentFailureJob scheduling.

retry_ladder.description: Initial payment attempt at scheduled renewal. If succeeds, MembershipRenewed fires + period extends. If transient failure, schedules attempt 2.
First retry. By this point NotifyPaymentFailureJob has sent a 24-hour reminder AND a 72-hour reminder.

retry_ladder.trigger: day+7 from attempt 2 failure (day+10 from attempt 1)
retry_ladder.description: Second retry. Adds SMS to the dunning channel mix if tenant holds `membership_dunning_sms` entitlement.

retry_ladder.trigger: day+14 from attempt 3 failure (day+24 from attempt 1)
retry_ladder.description: Final retry. Failure at this step triggers LapseMembershipJob after config.membership.renewal.grace_days_after_final_failure (default 3 additional days).

notification_cadence_per_attempt.description: First reminder. Shows failure + deep-link to update payment method + next attempt date.
Third reminder. SMS added when tenant holds membership.dunning_sms feature AND attempt_number >= 3. Final warning before lapse.

post_lapse_communication.description: Terminal communication after final failed attempt + grace expires. Includes deep-link to update payment method + resume membership — some customers reactivate after seeing the terminal email.

post_lapse_marketing_win_back.trigger: MembershipLapsed + 30 days elapsed + customer has marketing consent
post_lapse_marketing_win_back.description: Marketing-consent-gated win-back campaigns. Not owned here — this module publishes the MembershipLapsed event; growth module subscribes.

cross_reference: Tenants can override the cadence via settings/membership section 2 — reminder hours are user-configurable within 1-168h bounds
